title: BordersOnXaeroMap
description: A simple addon for the Xaero's World Map, which adds drawing visual chunk-based zones on the map for everyone.
body:
[![Total Downloads on GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/immorrtalz/BordersOnXaeroMap/total?label=total%20downloads%20on%20GitHub&color=blue)](https://github.com/immorrtalz/BordersOnXaeroMap/releases) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-GPL%20v3-goldenrod)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html) [![Available for](https://img.shields.io/badge/available%20for-NeoForge-orange)](https://modrinth.com/mod/bordersonxaeromap/versions) [![Available for](https://img.shields.io/badge/available%20for-1.21.1-red)](https://modrinth.com/mod/bordersonxaeromap/versions) --- A simple [open source](https://github.com/immorrtalz/BordersOnXaeroMap) addon for the [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map), which adds drawing visual chunk-based zones on the map for everyone. > ### IMPORTANT > The mod is currently in **alpha**, and at the moment it only works locally. It is **expected to have a LOT of fundamental changes** internally.\ > Don't expect a savefile to be inter-version compatible as this is a working prototype - there'll be breaking changes soon.\ > Don't expect support for other Minecraft versions and mod loaders until it is somewhat finished for `1.21.1 NeoForge`.
## ✨ Features - Obviously, integration with the [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Toggle all zones (local only) *(not being saved on the map closure currently)* - Click on a zone to make it active. Click on any empty spot to clear active zone - Draw mode (draw a new zone if no active zone is selected or add/erase to/from currently active one). Hold `LMB` to add, `Shift + LMB` to erase - Edit zone (rename, change border and fill appearance with a palette of 14 predefined colors). The menu could be accessed by the toolbar button and by double-clicking on a zone - Delete zone - *[Planned]* Multiplayer support *(local only currently)* - *[Planned]* Private and public zones *(the exact concept is WIP)* ## 🔗 Dependencies - [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) (only on a client) ## 📫 Contacts If you have any questions or suggestions, you could open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/immorrtalz/BordersOnXaeroMap/issues) or contact me in Discord (`@immorrtalz`) or [Telegram (`@immorrtalz`)](https://t.me/immorrtalz) ## ⚖️ License Except where otherwise stated, the content of this repository is provided under the [GNU GPLv3 license](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html). --- Not associated with or approved by Mojang or Microsoft. *P. S. The mod screenshots might have been done with my resourcepack on, so buttons and other UI elements might have non-vanilla look*
